zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Hastings於大約1200年出生在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，他的父親Hugh de Hastings28歲，母親Hellena de Allerston25歲。他與Amicia De Warwickshire結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1246年在英國越可爾阿勒斯東享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Hastings于大约1200年出生在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，他的父亲Hugh de Hastings28岁，母亲Hellena de Allerston25岁。他与Amicia De Warwickshire结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1246年在英国越可爾阿勒斯東享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Hastings was born about 1200, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, his father, Hugh de Hastings, was 28 and his mother, Hellena de Allerston, was 25. He married Amicia De Warwickshire. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1246, in Allerston, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Hastings est né environ 1200, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Hastings, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hellena de Allerston, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Amicia De Warwickshire. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1246, à Allerston, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Hastings(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Hastings(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Hellena de Allerston(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Amicia De Warwickshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1246년 영국 요르크실르 앨레르스턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
